title: critoniopsis pallida
intro: Critoniopsis pallida, also known as Yellowhead, is a shrub-like plant in the Asteraceae family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, making it a potential treatment for conditions like eczema and acne. Critoniopsis pallida can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in folk medicine to promote wound healing and skin health.
